diarized_transcript:
[Agent] Thank you for calling Genshin Impact Player Support, this is Priya. How can I help?
[Caller] I was fighting a Weekly Boss — Azhdaha — and halfway through the fight he just disappeared. My resin got used, I got no rewards. I'm livid.
[Agent] Oh, that is genuinely infuriating — Weekly Boss resin is expensive and losing a fight to a bug instead of to your own play is the worst outcome. I'm going to make this right. UID please?
[Caller] 603245891.
[Agent] Thanks, Marcus. Let me pull your combat session logs. Confirmed — I see the Azhdaha instance initiated at 14:12 local, 30 Original Resin deducted, and the instance terminated at 14:16 with a 'host disconnection' error server-side, not client-side. That's our bug, not yours.
[Caller] Exactly. My internet is fine, I checked.
[Agent] Your connection was stable throughout — the drop was on our boss server. Here's what I'm doing. First, refunding the 30 Original Resin to your account right now. Second, issuing the expected drop equivalent as a manual compensation ticket: 3 Boss Materials of your choice from Azhdaha's drop table, plus 60 Primogems for the disruption. Which material would you like? The options are Dragon Lord's Crown, Bloodjade Branch, or Gilded Scale.
[Caller] Gilded Scale, please — I'm leveling Zhongli.
[Agent] Excellent choice. Crediting 3 Gilded Scales, 60 Primogems, and 30 Resin via in-game mail now. Should arrive within 5 minutes, valid 30 days.
[Caller] Wow, that's more than fair.
[Agent] You shouldn't lose progress to our bugs, full stop. I'm also filing an engineering ticket with your session ID so they can track the host drop — if there's a pattern, they'll patch it in the next hotfix.
[Caller] Appreciate you taking it seriously.
[Agent] Of course. Tip for the future — if a boss fight errors out like that, the session replay auto-uploads and support can always verify server-side. So any player in that situation should call in rather than assume the loss is final.
[Caller] Good to know. Thanks Priya.
[Agent] Anytime, Marcus. Enjoy leveling Zhongli!
